fig1-astable-555.description: Astable multivibrator circuit using NE555 IC (RA = RB = 10 kΩ, C1 = C2 = 0.1 µF)

fig2-monostable-555.description: Monostable multivibrator circuit using 555 IC (R = 10 kΩ, C = 0.1 µF)

fig-555-block-diagram.description: Block diagram of the 555 IC Timer showing internal comparators, flip-flop, discharge transistor, and voltage divider

obs-astable-oscilloscope.description: Oscilloscope capture: Astable multivibrator Vout (square wave) and Vc (capacitor ramp)

obs-astable-theoretical.description: Theoretical response of an astable multivibrator showing Vout and Vc waveforms

obs-monostable-oscilloscope.description: Oscilloscope capture: Monostable multivibrator Vout and Vc, pulse width ≈ 1.1 ms

obs-monostable-theoretical.description: Theoretical response of a monostable multivibrator showing trigger, capacitor voltage, and output
